title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: morgan vulnerable to Log Forging via unneutralized control characters in :remote-user
description:
### Impact

Morgan's `:remote-user` token extracts the Basic auth username from the `Authorization` header and writes it to the log stream without neutralizing control characters. An attacker can send a crafted `Authorization: Basic` header containing CR/LF characters to inject forged log lines, corrupting the one-request-per-line structure of access logs.

The built-in `combined`, `common`, `default`, and `short` formats are affected, as well as any custom format that includes `:remote-user`.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to inject forged log entries or manipulate log files by exploiting unneutralized control characters in the :remote-user token. This can lead to corrupted logs, making it difficult to trace legitimate activity, detect malicious actions, or comply with audit requirements.
recommended_actions: Update to a patched version of Morgan that neutralizes control characters in the :remote-user token.
Implement input validation to sanitize the Authorization header before it is logged.
Review and monitor access logs for signs of log forging or irregular entries.

title: API Platform Core vulnerable to cross-user attribute leak in JSON:API and HAL item normalizers due to missing isCacheKeySafe gate
description:
### Impact

`#[ApiProperty(security: ...)]` is evaluated per request to decide whether a property is exposed. The `componentsCache` arrays in `ApiPlatform\JsonApi\Serializer\ItemNormalizer` and `ApiPlatform\Hal\Serializer\ItemNormalizer` are keyed on `$context['cache_key']`, which is set unconditionally before delegating to the parent normalizer. The component structure (attributes, relationships, links) computed for one request can therefore be reused for a subsequent request whose user has a d

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows cross-user attribute leakage in API responses, potentially exposing sensitive data to unauthorized users. This could lead to data breaches, privacy violations, and compliance risks.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest patched version of the API Platform Core library to address the vulnerability.
Audit API configurations to ensure sensitive properties are properly secured and access controls are enforced.
Implement additional logging and monitoring to detect any unauthorized access or data leakage incidents.

title: Dell PowerFlex Manager, Version prior to 5.1.0.1, contain(s) an Improper Neutralization of...
description: Dell PowerFlex Manager, Version prior to 5.1.0.1, contain(s) an Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability. A low privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to Information disclosure, Information exposure, and Unauthorized access.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56690.

title: Dell Unisphere for PowerMax, version(s) 10.3.0.5 and prior, contain(s) a path traversal...
description: Dell Unisphere for PowerMax, version(s) 10.3.0.5 and prior, contain(s) a path traversal vulnerability. A low privileged attacker with remote access could potentially exploit this vulnerability to read arbitrary files.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The path traversal vulnerability in Dell Unisphere for PowerMax could allow a low-privileged remote attacker to read arbitrary files, potentially exposing sensitive configuration files, credentials, or other critical data. This could lead to further exploitation or data breaches.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest version of Dell Unisphere for PowerMax that addresses this vulnerability.
Restrict remote access to the application by implementing network segmentation and firewall rules.
Regularly monitor and audit access logs for any unauthorized or suspicious activity.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

xfrm: iptfs: preserve shared...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

xfrm: iptfs: preserve shared-frag marker in iptfs_consume_frags()

iptfs_consume_frags() transfers paged fragments from one socket buffer
to another but fails to propagate the SKBFL_SHARED_FRAG flag. This is
the same class of bug that was fixed in skb_try_coalesce() for
CVE-2026-46300: when fragments backed by read-only page-cache pages are
merged, the marker indicating their shared nature must be preserved so
that ESP can deci

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Linux kernel could allow improper handling of shared fragments in network traffic, potentially leading to data corruption, denial of service, or exploitation in environments using IPsec with ESP. This could impact systems relying on secure data transmission.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Linux kernel to the latest patched version that resolves CVE-2026-53363.
Review and monitor systems using IPsec with ESP for any unusual network behavior or signs of exploitation.
Implement network segmentation and additional monitoring for critical systems to mitigate potential exploitation.

title: The Invoice123 plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to,...
description: The Invoice123 plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 1.7.0. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to overwrite the plugin's API key stored in wp_options, modify invoice plugin settings, and alter WooCommerce tax rate data in the wp_woocommerce_tax_rates table.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9857.

title: mtr is vulnerable to Out-of-bound read vulnerability in ipinfo_lookup() function. An attacker who...
description:
mtr is vulnerable to Out-of-bound read vulnerability in ipinfo_lookup() function. An attacker who can influence the TXT response used for AS lookups can trigger this bug by returning a DNS response that is larger than 512 bytes and uses a crafted compression pointer in the answer NAME field. ipinfo_lookup() function uses the length of the response as the end-of-message boundary for dn_expand() function. The result is a reliable crash.


This issue exists in the mtr through version 0.96 and it wa

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-14461.

title: R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to OS Command Injection in the Optical Character Recognition (OCR)...
description: R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to OS Command Injection in the Optical Character Recognition (OCR) module. Multiple command execution functions accept user-controllable file paths without proper sanitization before passing them to the system shell via SSH. In current infrastructure the URL encoding neutralizes the injection during the standard web upload flow. An authenticated attacker who is able to trigger the OCR functionality for the uploaded file can execute OS commands within the context of a roo

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41880.

title: R-SOFT DMS stores superadmin credentials using a non-salted nested MD5 hash. This allows an...
description:
R-SOFT DMS stores superadmin credentials using a non-salted nested MD5 hash. This allows an attacker who obtain password hash to decode superadmin credentials. Critically, this password cannot be changed except by modifying the configuration file.

This issue was fixed in version v3.17-2000.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The use of non-salted nested MD5 hashes for storing superadmin credentials poses a significant risk of credential compromise. If an attacker obtains the hash, they can potentially reverse-engineer the password. Since the superadmin password cannot be changed without modifying the configuration file, this creates a persistent vulnerability, leaving systems exposed to unauthorized access and potential data breaches.
recommended_actions: Immediately update R-SOFT DMS to version v3.17-2000 or later to address the vulnerability.
Audit all systems using R-SOFT DMS to ensure no unauthorized access has occurred and monitor for suspicious activity.
Implement stronger password hashing mechanisms (e.g., bcrypt, Argon2) and enforce regular password rotation policies.

title: The Mail Mint – Email Marketing, Newsletter, Email Automation & WooCommerce Emails plugin for...
description: The Mail Mint – Email Marketing, Newsletter, Email Automation & WooCommerce Emails plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the 'recipients' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.24.1 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrator-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries t

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with administrator-level access to execute arbitrary SQL queries, potentially leading to data leakage, unauthorized access, or database corruption.
recommended_actions: Update the Mail Mint plugin to the latest patched version once available.
Restrict administrator-level access to trusted personnel and review user permissions.
Implement web application firewalls (WAF) to monitor and block malicious SQL injection attempts.

title: R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) attack in multiple file...
description:
R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) attack in multiple file download endpoints. The application fetches files from the database by ID and serves them to whoever requests them, relying only on session authentication, meaning any valid user can access any file.

This issue was fixed in version v3.19-2862 and v3.17-2580.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41878.

title: A flaw was found in libarchive. This vulnerability allows a remote attacker to trigger a heap...
description: A flaw was found in libarchive. This vulnerability allows a remote attacker to trigger a heap overflow by providing a specially crafted tar archive. The issue occurs during the parsing of a PAX extended header containing a malformed SUN.holesdata sparse-file attribute. Successful exploitation could lead to a denial of service, making the system unavailable, or potentially allow for arbitrary code execution, giving the attacker control over the affected system.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in libarchive could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service by exploiting a heap overflow. This could lead to system compromise or downtime, depending on the context in which libarchive is used.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update for libarchive as soon as it becomes available.
Limit the handling of untrusted tar archives and implement input validation where possible.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or signs of exploitation related to this vulnerability.

title: The Jeg Kit for Elementor – Powerful Addons for Elementor, Widgets & Templates for WordPress...
description: The Jeg Kit for Elementor – Powerful Addons for Elementor, Widgets & Templates for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the Image Box widget's 'sg_body_description' parameter in versions up to, and including, 3.2.6. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on the description attribute in the render_body() method of the Image_Box_View class — every other attribute used by the method is wrapped in esc_attr(), but the description

description: The JoomSport – for Sports: Team & League, Football, Hockey & more plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to time-based SQL Injection via 'event' Shortcode Attribute in all versions up to, and including, 5.7.9 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13010.

title: The Logo Slider – Logo Carousel, Client Logo Slider & Brand Showcase for WordPress plugin for...
description: The Logo Slider – Logo Carousel, Client Logo Slider & Brand Showcase for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'lgx_tooltip_position' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 5.5 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers with contributor-level access or higher to inject malicious scripts into pages, which could lead to data theft, session hijacking, or defacement of affected websites. This poses a risk to website integrity and user trust.
recommended_actions: Update the plugin to the latest version once a patch is released by the vendor.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious scripts.
Restrict contributor-level access to trusted users and regularly audit user permissions.

This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to mark arbitrary pending appointments as Confirmed and forge an associated completed payment record in wp_kc_payments_appointment_mappings using an attacker-supplied payment ID, bypassing p

title: R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to Stored XSS in file upload functionality. Authenticated attacker can...
description:
R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to Stored XSS in file upload functionality. Authenticated attacker can inject arbitrary HTML and JS into the name of the file being uploaded, which will be executed when visiting file list or upload status by other users.

This issue was fixed in version v3.19-2832 and v3.17-2580.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41877.

title: R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to OS Command Injection in konwertujAction() function. The document...
description:
R-SOFT DMS is vulnerable to OS Command Injection in konwertujAction() function. The document converter executes shell commands using unsanitized file paths and format parameters. This allows an authenticated attacker to execute arbitrary system commands with the privileges of the web server user.

This issue was fixed in version v3.19-2752 and v3.17-2580.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41876.

title: CVE-2026-13722 - WatchGuard Fireware OS contains a firmware validation bypass when processing a backup image via the
description: WatchGuard Fireware OS contains a firmware validation bypass when processing a backup image via the backup/restore feature. An authenticated administrator can exploit this vulnerability to install a tampered firmware image.This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 11.0 up to and including 11.12.4_Update1, 12.0 up to and including 12.12 and 2025.1 up to and including 2025.6.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13722.

title: CVE-2026-13384 - An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS wgagent process could allow an authen
description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS wgagent process could allow an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted requests to the Management Web UI.This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 12.1 up to and including 12.12 and 2025.1 up to and including 2026.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, or disruption of services. This could severely impact the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of affected systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update WatchGuard Fireware OS to a patched version beyond 12.12 or 2026.2, as provided by the vendor.
Restrict access to the Management Web UI to trusted IPs and implement network segmentation to limit exposure.
Monitor logs for unusual activity or exploitation attempts targeting the wgagent process and enable intrusion detection/prevention systems.

title: CVE-2026-13383 - An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS ikestubd process could allow an authe
description: An Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS ikestubd process could allow an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code via a specially crafted requests to the Management Web UI.This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 12.1 up to and including 12.12 and 2025.1 up to and including 2026.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated privileged user to execute arbitrary code on affected WatchGuard Fireware OS systems. This could lead to a full system compromise, unauthorized access to sensitive data, disruption of network operations, and potential lateral movement within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest security patches provided by WatchGuard to update Fireware OS to a version beyond 12.12 or 2026.2.
Restrict access to the Management Web UI to trusted IP addresses and ensure strong authentication mechanisms are in place.
Monitor network traffic and system logs for any suspicious activity, particularly around the Management Web UI, and implement intrusion detection/prevention systems.

title: CVE-2026-13377 - Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerab
description:
Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS SIP Proxy module allows Stored XSS. This vulnerability is an additional unmitigated attack path for CVE-2025-6947.

This issue affects Fireware OS 12.0 up to and including 12.12, 12.5 up to and including 12.5.18, and 2025.1 up to and including 2026.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13377.

title: CVE-2026-13371 - An authenticated administrator can trigger a denial-of-service condition in the Fireware Management
description: An authenticated administrator can trigger a denial-of-service condition in the Fireware Management Web UI by sending malformed or crafted data to the put_data endpoint, which performs unsafe deserialization of the attacker-supplied input.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13371.

title: CVE-2026-13368 - WatchGuard Fireware OS contains a race condition leading to a use-after-free vulnerability in LDAP a
description:
WatchGuard Fireware OS contains a race condition leading to a use-after-free vulnerability in LDAP authentication for the Mobile User VPN with IKEv2. A remote unauthenticated attacker could exploit this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code in the context of the iked process on Fireboxes that have a Mobile VPN with IKEv2 configured to use an external LDAP authentication server.

This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 11.0 up to and including 11.12.4_Update1, 12.0 up to and including 12.12 and 2025.1 up to and including 2026.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13368.

title: CVE-2026-13084 - A null pointer dereference vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow a remote unauthenticate
description:
A null pointer dereference vulnerability in WatchGuard Fireware OS may allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to create a denial-of-service (DoS) condition by sending specially crafted IKEv2 messages. This vulnerability affects both the Mobile User VPN with IKEv2 and the Branch Office VPN using IKEv2 when configured with a dynamic gateway peer.

This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 11.10.2 up to and including 11.12.4_Update1, 12.0 up to and including 12.12 and 2025.1 up to and including 2026.2

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13084.

title: CVE-2026-13079 - A local privilege escalation vulnerability in the WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL client for Windows
description:
A local privilege escalation vulnerability in the WatchGuard Mobile VPN with SSL client for Windows allows a local attacker to escalate their privileges to NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM on the machine where the client is installed.

This issue affects the Mobile VPN with SSL client for Windows up to and including 2026.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13079.

This vulnerability affects Fireware OS 11.0 up to and including 11.12.4_Update1, 12.0 up to and including 12.12 and 2025.1 up to and including 2026.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-13054.
